story.text: The Anthology should not merely fold arcs into through-lines; it should emit gateway-admissible chapters: throughline -> chapter -> candidate slice -> pull gateway. The pull gateway decides whether a chapter is actually landable; the patrol reveals when the Anthology is producing pretty clusters that never land. Value: keeps the Anthology from being decorative re-org and ties it to terminal pull.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
